title: S.O.3143 (E) dated 08/07/2022-Amendment in Constitution of SEIAA/SEAC Jammu and Kashmir
description: S.O.3143 (E) dated 08/07/2022-Amendment in Constitution of SEIAA/SEAC Jammu and Kashmir

[F. No. IA3-13/1/2022-1A.111] TANMAY KUMAR, Addl. Secy. [F. No. [A3-13/1/2022-1A.111] TANMAY KUMAR, Addl. Secy. W@wfitww,qu&wfitfiiwmfiflwmafifi,w@ e 3 fre afraTers & &7 § wrk wor ¥ for et siftveror iy st F s wdt B s dae o st wgra, Rk st ara-afe, wieEed o ows el wr Fer B av o i o§ Execckauunl 0. iR, ST U Fedie F e sie waedt qur T w R s afi, SR TF FA e T wEET Y A5 A B, ATAT AT AR S w ST U FHIT T w5 At F agane e e St | [=-1101 3/31/2007-3€.T.-1I(D)] s Hifeare, @ atim MINISTRY OF HOUSING AND URBAN AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 5th July, 2019 S.0. 2379(E).— In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (3) of section 3 of the Environment (Protection) Act, 1986 (29 of 1986) and in pursuance of the notification of the Government of India, in the erstwhile Ministry of Environment and Forests, number S.0. 1533(E), dated the 14" September, 2006 (hereinafter referred to as the said notification), the Central Government hereby constitutes the State Level Environment Impact Assessment Authority, Jammu and Kashmir (hereinafter referred to as the Authority, Jammu and Kashmir) comprising of the following members, namely:— 1) Shri Lal Chand - Chairman; Village Khearian, P/O Gole Gujral, Jammu — 180002 -- 5 of 7 -- THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] @) [©)] 2. Shri Nazir Ahmed & H.No. 12, Jeelanabad, Lane 1, Batpora, Srinagar — 190006 Director, Ecology, Environment and Remote Sensing, - Government of Jammu and Kashmir from the date of publication of this order in the Official Gazette. 3 said notification. 4. 5. Member; Member-Secretary. The Chairman and members of the Authority, Jammu and Kashmir shall hold office for a term of three years The Authority,Jammu and Kashmir shall exercise such powers and follow such procedures as specified in the The Authority, Jammu and Kashmir shall base its decision on the recommendations of the State Level Expert Appraisal Committee, Jammu and Kashmir constituted under paragraph 5 of this order. For the purposes of assisting the Authority,Jammu and Kashmir, the Central Government, in consultation with the Government of Jammu and Kashmir, hereby constitutes the State Level Expert Appraisal Committee, Jammu and Kashmir comprising of the following members, namely :- (0] @ (&) “) &) ©) (@] ®) (&) (10) an 12) Shri Subhash Chandra Sharma 331, Shastri Nagar, Jammu — 180004 Shri M. A. Tak 124 Mominabad (near JACKFED), Anantnag — 192101 Shri BrajBhushan Sharma 278, Sector 2, ChanniHimmat, Jammu Shri Abdul Rashid Makroo House No. 9, Lane No. 11, Sector C, Gulshan Nagar, Nowgam By- Pass, Srinagar — 190019 Professor Arvind Jasrotia 33-D, Sainik Colony, Jammu — 180011 Dr. Gulam Muhammad Dar (Associate Professor) Jammu and Kashmir Institute of Management, Public Administration and rural Development, Main Campus, M.A. Road, Srinagar — 190001 Shri Irfan Yasin (Vice Chairman, Retired) Bagh I Hyder Hyderpora Bypass, Stinagar Professor M. A. Khan General Post Office Box 726, Srinagar — 190001 Professor Falendra Kumar Sudan Department of Economics, University of Jammu, Jammu — 180006 Professor Anil K. Raina Department of Environmental Sciences, University of Jammu, Jammu — 180006 Professor Shakil Ahmad Romshoo Department of Earth Sciences, University of Kashmir, Srinagar — 190006 Scientist, Incharge Remote Sensing and Geographic Information System Lab Chairman; Member; Member; Member; Member; Member; Member; Member; Member; Member; Member; Secretary. -- 6 of 7 -- [T -8 3(ii)] A 1 TSP : SR 5 {5 The Chairman and members of the State Level Expert Appraisal Committee, Jammu and Kashmir shall hold office for a term of three years from the date of publication of this order in the Official Gazette. 7 The State Level Expert Appraisal Committee, Jammu and Kashmir shall exercise such powers and follow such procedures as specified in the said notification. 8. The State Level Expert Appraisal Committee, Jammu and Kashmir shall function on the principle of collective responsibility and the Chairman shall endeavor to reach a consensus in each case, and if consensus cannot be reached, the views of the majority shall prevail. 9. The Government of Jammu and Kashmir shall notify an agency to act as Secretariat for the Authority, Jammu and Kashmir and the State Level Expert Appraisal Committee, Jammu and Kashmir, and shall provide all financial and logistic support including accommodation, transportation and such other facilities in respect of all their statutory functions. 10. The sitting fee, travelling allowance and dearness allowance to the Chairman and members of the Authority, Jammu and Kashmir and the Chairman and members of the State Level Expert Appraisal Committee, Jammu and Kashmir shall be paid in accordance with the relevantrules of the Government of Jammu and Kashmir. [J-11013/31/2007-IA-IK(D] ARVIND NAUTIYAL, Jt. Secy.
